tongueTwisters.meaning: Crow's feather, sparrow's feather (alternating 'pukka' with birds).

tongueTwisters.text: Fischers Fritz fischt frische Fische, frische Fische fischt Fischers Fritz.
tongueTwisters.meaning: Fisherman Fritz is fishing for fresh fish, fresh fish are fished by Fisherman Fritz.
tongueTwisters.transliteration: Fischers Fritz fischt frische Fische, frische Fische fischt Fischers Fritz.

tongueTwisters.text: Un chasseur sachant chasser doit savoir chasser sans son chien.
tongueTwisters.meaning: A hunter who knows how to hunt must know how to hunt without his dog.
tongueTwisters.transliteration: Un chasseur sachant chasser doit savoir chasser sans son chien.

tongueTwisters.text: Tres tristes tigres tragaban trigo en un trigal en tres tristes trastos.
tongueTwisters.meaning: Three sad tigers were swallowing wheat in a wheat field in three sad dishes.
tongueTwisters.transliteration: Tres tristes tigres tragaban trigo en un trigal en tres tristes trastos.

tongueTwisters.text: யாழ்ப்பாணத்து பலாப்பழம் வழுக்கி விழுந்தது.
tongueTwisters.meaning: The Jaffna jackfruit slipped and fell (emphasizes the retroflex 'zha' sound unique to Tamil).

tongueTwisters.text: Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers. A peck of pickled peppers Peter Piper picked.

tongueTwisters.text: She sells seashells by the seashore. The shells she sells are surely seashells.
tongueTwisters.meaning: A vendor lady selling coastal shells on the sandy beach.

tongueTwisters.text: How much wood would a woodchuck chuck if a woodchuck could chuck wood?
tongueTwisters.meaning: A funny, hypothetical calculation regarding a rodent's capability to move timber.

tongueTwisters.text: Six sleek swans swam swiftly southwards.
tongueTwisters.meaning: Six elegant birds flying or floating in a fast direction down south.

tongueTwisters.text: யாழ்ப்பாணத்து பலாப்பழம் வழுக்கி விழுந்தது.

tongueTwisters.text: కాకి కాక కాకికి కాక కాకపోతే కాకికి కాక మరేమిటి?
tongueTwisters.meaning: If a crow doesn't feel hot, who else would feel hot if not a crow? (utilizes phonetic play on ka-ka).
tongueTwisters.transliteration: Kaaki kaaka kaakiki kaaka kaakapothe kaakiki kaaka maremiti?
